Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: A154
Piece of Ice

Triggers: Once in a while

Turns 3 enemy units with the greatest damage into ice blocks for 3 sec. They can't move and take 25% more damage. In addition, units take 100000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Sage bot code: A154

First trigger: Once in a while

Cooldown: 11 secs
